ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง
ระดับพื้นชั้นหลังคา

elements.description: Ø2"AVC (ต่อออกนอกอาคาร) -- vent pipe with cap, terminates outside the building above the highest labeled level
Ø2"V, dashed vertical vent line running from the AVC cap down past the +3.75 level
two stacked check/stop-valve glyphs immediately right of the Ø2"V line near the +3.75 level, on the Ø3/4"CW riser branch -- exact valve type not separately labeled at this point
Ø4"S soil pipe entering the vertical stack at the +3.75 level, turning down into the Ø4"SW combined stack
Ø4"SW vertical stack running the full height of the diagram from the +3.75 level connection down to the septic/treatment tank inlet at the bottom
second Ø2"V dashed vertical vent line running parallel to the Ø4"SW stack down to the lower levels
Ø3/4"CW dash-dot vertical riser running from the water-meter/booster-pump area at the bottom up past the +3.75 level

ถังเก็บน้ำสำเร็จรูปแสตนเลส ขนาดจุ 1 ลบ.ม. มาตรฐาน มอก.989 พร้อมขาตั้งครบชุด วางบนพื้นคอนกรีตเสริมเหล็กหนา 0.10ม. เสริมเหล็ก Ø9มม. @0.20ม. -- stainless prefab water storage tank, 1 cu.m., on its own reinforced concrete pad
FLOAT VALVE Ø1/2" at the top inlet of the water storage tank
BALL VALVE Ø1/2" adjacent to the float valve at the tank top
Ø3/4" BY PASS branch with a valve symbol, feeding around/into the booster pump line

เครื่องสูบน้ำเพิ่มแรงดัน (BOOSTER PUMP, labeled BP.) ชนิดอัตโนมัติ ขนาดไม่น้อยกว่า 200 วัตต์ อัตราการสูบน้ำไม่น้อยกว่า 28 ลิตร/นาที ที่ความสูง 12 เมตร ผลิตภัณฑ์ MITSUBISHI, HITACHI, FUJIKA หรือเทียบเท่า
ชุดมาตรวัดน้ำ Ø1/2" ( ค่าใช้จ่ายในการติดตั้งเป็นของผู้รับจ้างทั้งสิ้น ), positioned on the Ø3/4"CW line at the far right, downstream of 3 hose-bib/faucet (C.) symbols
3x ก๊อกน้ำ (C.) symbols on the Ø3/4"CW branch line near the water meter

ถังบำบัดน้ำเสียสำเร็จรูปชนิดเกรอะ-กรองไร้อากาศ (hatched tank symbol at bottom-left): ปริมาตรส่วนเกรอะไม่น้อยกว่า 1.0 ลบ.ม., ปริมาตรส่วนกรอง ไม่น้อยกว่า 0.25 ลบ.ม., ผลิตภัณฑ์ AQUA, PP, DOS, SAN-PAC, HICLEAR หรือเทียบเท่า, การติดตั้งให้เป็นไปตามมาตรฐานผู้ผลิต -- receives the Ø4"SW stack and discharges via Ø4"SW to the site catch basin (ต่อลงบ่อพักท่อระบายน้ำ)
Ø4"SW outlet arrow labeled 'ต่อลงบ่อพักท่อระบายน้ำ' leading left off the septic tank at the +0.00 level

warnings: PATTERN CLASSIFICATION NOTE: this sheet ('ไดอะแกรมระบบสุขาภิบาลแนวดิ่ง' -- vertical sanitary system riser diagram) is a genuinely new sheet type not present in either house #1's (7-sheet) or house #2's (8-sheet) sanitary sets, consistent with the index on page46 listing 10 sheets (2 more than house #2). No reference example was reviewed for this exact page type before extraction. Classified as pattern 'side_profile' per the schema taxonomy (non-top-down view, elevation/riser-style, no rebar) as the closest fit among the 13 defined patterns -- it is not a 'plan' (no grid_ref/floor layout) and not a structural 'section' (no beam/column/footing rebar spec). Flagging this classification choice for review since 'side_profile' is normally used for building elevations/sections, not plumbing riser schematics specifically.

LEVEL LABEL INCONSISTENCY (transcribed literally, not corrected): the diagram prints 'ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง' (ground-floor level) TWICE at two different elevations (+3.75 and +0.60), and prints 'ระดับพื้นชั้นหลังคา' (roof-floor level) at the LOWEST elevation shown (+0.00), below the two 'ชั้นล่าง' labels -- physically implausible ordering (a roof level below a ground-floor level) if taken at face value. Zoomed in twice (2 separate crops) to confirm the printed text pixel-by-pixel -- both readings are exactly as transcribed above. CROSS-PAGE CONFIRMATION: the upper-floor plan (SN-06, page51) shows all its rooms (นอน1/นอน2/นอน3/โถง/ห้องน้ำ2) at level +3.75, which proves +3.75 IS actually the upper floor ('ชั้นบน'), not 'ชั้นล่าง' as printed on this riser diagram -- so the 'ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง +3.75' label here is a confirmed labeling error in the source drawing (most likely reused boilerplate text not corrected for this sheet), not a misreading on my part. The '+0.00 ระดับพื้นชั้นหลังคา' label at the bottom (next to the septic tank, i.e. at/below ground level) is also almost certainly mislabeled -- likely should read something like 'ระดับดิน' (ground level) -- but this could not be cross-confirmed against another page. Transcribed literally as printed in both cases, not corrected/edited, per extraction rules; flagged for human review.

grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true here -- this is a schematic vertical diagram, not on the building's structural plan grid, consistent with how house #2's bathroom-plan inset detail was handled.

Exact valve type for the two stacked check/stop-valve glyphs near the +3.75 level (on the Ø3/4"CW branch) is not separately labeled with text on the sheet -- described by position/appearance only, flagged for zoom-review.

Water tank, booster pump, and septic tank equipment specs are clearly legible full text blocks, transcribed in full with high confidence. The septic tank equipment_specs text (grease/filter volumes, acceptable brands) matches the same boilerplate seen in house #1/#2's floor-plan sheets, here relocated onto this dedicated riser-diagram sheet instead.
